creator: lorenzotorres@outlook.it
text: I have recently installed FreeBSD 14.1-STABLE on my Thinkpad T14 (Intel), which has a Realtek RTS522A card for the microSD slot. I tried inserting a microSD card in my laptop only to find out it wasn't being recognized by the OS. I tried to reboot and my card was found. I gave a look at https://cgit.freebsd.org/src/tree/sys/dev/rtsx/rtsx.c#n182, and the card is supported indeed.
